name: Molly's Fat-Free Marshmallow Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-measure the ingredients.
2. Melt marshmallows over low heat or microwave on high for 2-3 minutes until smooth.
3. Remove from heat. Add Molly McButter Sprinkles and mix well.
4. Add cereal and stir quickly until well coated.
5. Press mixture evenly into a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan coated with cooking spray.
6. Cool completely.
7. Cut into squares.
Cheran's Notes: The marshmallows puff up immensely in the microwave, so use a container about six times their volume. The mixture cools very fast after mixing, so work quickly. Cut into squares while still somewhat warm; it is almost impossible to cut once it cools. Overall, it's worth it. It tastes like the real thing, just a bit chewier. Next time, I will probably try it with marshmallow cream to see if it makes it a little softer and work really fast.
